case_title: DOUGLAS LAINE VS. KATRINA BURMA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED & TO REQUEST NEW HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAINE, DOUGLAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAINE, DOUGLAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARKER, BRET (INSURED) ; AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST KATRINA BURMA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-01-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-14-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,744.37 FILED BY LAINE, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT BURMA, KATRINA PARKER, BRET (INSURED) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. 1 DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRET PARKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATRINA BURMA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO KATRINA BURMA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-01-2014 AT 3:30 PM AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
